title: 20th Anniversary Challenge
description: This achievement is gained upon eating cake in locations around Norrath.

requirements.label: Eat cake at the water that falls from up high to the plains
Eat cake inside the red up the secret paths of mist
Eat cake while bathing in blood at a wedding
Eat cake on the twilight tower near a ring to fungus
Eat cake while you observe the ball and hammer of invention
Eat cake under a globe surrounded by hate
Eat cake by a frozen arch near the lost depths
Eat cake where a titan offers water with open hands
Eat cake while ignoring the slaughter in the grip of a fallen claw
Eat cake among the serenity of twined dragons
Eat cake after a dreadful dinner
Eat cake while center stage to the toll of a bell
Eat cake while enjoying pink flowers and wind through the willows
Eat cake while paying quiet respects
Hold your bile and eat cake within the claws of the fountain of filth
Eat cake near the purest water
Eat cake with others who enjoy sweets
Eat cake while bathing in radiance
Eat cake while you dare fear to crush you
Eat cake in the fourth dark before the progenitors
Eat cake deep under the sea, before the god with floating candles
Eat cake at life's uncomfortable chair
Eat cake between the five elements that were in another reality
Eat cake while within the maw of a mourned and lonely dragon
Eat cake on the head of a fallen prince
Eat cake while observing a mobile forge tool

requirements.label: Rosalind Mischeva in the Plane of Knowledge - Tempest Festival - Here Comes the Rain
Rosalind Mischeva in the Plane of Knowledge - Tempest Festival - Singing in the Reign
Ralph Mischeva in the Jaggedpine Forest - Tempest Festival - Reign of Rain
Ralph Mischeva in the Jaggedpine Forest - Tempest Festival -  Felled by the Rain

title: Tempest Festival: They Came From Below
description: This achievement is gained upon completion of the following Tempest Festival mission:

requirements.label: Loyelle Tanlonikan in Barren Coast - Mouth of Madness

title: Tempest Festival: They Came From Below Mission Challenges
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following Tempest Festival mission challenges.

requirements.label: Storm Debris: Collect the Remnants of the Scrykin.
Lightning Round: Kill Anatol Trogon in less than 30 minutes.
Reptile Displacement: Kill the Ancient Croc.

description: Logging in with an All Access Membership grants you an exclusive reward (one reward per character that logs in).

title: Autumn Appreciation Bonus '17
description: Logging in with an All Access Membership grants you an exclusive reward (one reward per character that logs in).

title: Stone Cold Summer Mission
description: This achievement is gained upon completion of the summer mission:

title: Stone Cold Summer Tasks
description: This achievement is gained upon completion of one of the summer tasks:

title: Summer Appreciation Bonus '18
description: Logging in with an All Access Membership grants you an exclusive reward (one reward per character that logs in).

title: Summer Appreciation Bonus '19
description: Logging in with an All Access Membership grants you an exclusive reward (one reward per character that logs in).

title: All That Glitters is Lava (Nagafen's Lair)
description: Even the rivers of lava are filled with treasure in Nagafen's Lair! This achievement can only be completed during the Hardcore Heritage event.

title: Bat Attack (Nagafen's Lair)
description: There's more than just dragons and giants to fear in Nagafen's Lair. This achievement can only be completed during the Hardcore Heritage event.

title: Chewed Froglok Snacks (Innothule Swamp)
description: A collection of previously chewed-on froglok snacks found on the ground in Innothule Swamp. These items can only be found during the Feast of Giving event.

title: Citadel Orchids (Liberated Citadel of Runnyeye)
description: A collection of Citadel orchids found around the Liberated Citadel of Runnyeye. These flowers can only be found during the Erollisi Day event.

title: Clutch of Fungi (Blightfire Moors)
description: A collection of spores from disease ridden sporali spreading through Blightfire Moors. These items can only be found during the Nights of the Dead event.

title: Creepers, Dodders, and Uninvited Lodgers (The Feerrott)
description: The Feerrott has shared a collection of parasitic plants. These items can only be found during the Stone Cold Summer event.

title: Curiously Crusty (Barren Coast)
description: The darkened sea has shared a collection of crusty shells. These items can only be found during the Tempest Festival.

title: Dedicated to the Flame (Nagafen's Lair)
description: A group of fire giants have dedicated their lives to defending Nagafen in his lair. This achievement can only be completed during the Hardcore Heritage event.

title: Discovery of Thunder (Jaggedpine Forest)
description: These pieces of poem have been spread through the Jaggedpine Forest. These items can only be found during the Tempest Festival event.

title: Echoforged Cracked Bone Fragments
description: A few handfuls of cracked bones have been found scattered across the Commonlands and Qeynos Hills.  These items can only be found during the Champions' Festival event.

title: Erollisi Day Haters (Neriak - Foreign Quarter)
description: Aggressive letters written by denizens of Neriak's Foreign Quarter during the Erollisi Day holiday. These items can only be found during the Erollisi Day event.

requirements.label: Hate Letter: Shut Up And Drink
Hate Letter: The Highest Form of Flattery
Hate Letter: Roar From the Balcony

title: Erollisi Day Lovers (Halas)
description: Passionate letters written by citizens of Halas to one another during the Erollisi Day holiday. These items can only be found during the Erollisi Day event.

requirements.label: Love Letter: The Pen Is Mightier

title: Festival Lights
description: Carefully crafted candles and clay oil lamps have been spread throughout the Halas, West Freeport, and Rathe Mountains. These items can only be found during the Lantern Festival.

title: It's a Mixed Bag
description: Curious jelly beans have been spread throughout the Eastern Wastes and Western Wastes. These items can only be found during the Stomples Day event.

title: Misplaced Dollies
description: Misplaced Frostfell dolls that have been lost by a curious yeti. These items can only be found during the Frostfell event.

title: Practically Impractical Gifts (Crescent Reach)
description: Impractical gifts have been dropped throughout Crescent Reach. These items can only be found during the Bristlebane Day event.

title: Puppy Love (Nagafen's Lair)
description: The kobolds in Nagafen's Lair have a romantic streak. This achievement can only be completed during the Hardcore Heritage event.

title: Reluctant Recruits (Castle Mistmoore)
description: Not all the vampires in Castle Mistmoore prefer to recruit followers by force. This achievement can only be completed during the Hardcore Heritage event.

title: Storm Debris (Barren Coast: Mouth of Madness)
description: The sticky residue of scrykin who lost their grip on reality. These items can only be found during the Tempest Festival.

title: The Silence of Daylight (Castle Mistmoore)
description: Wherever there are vampires, there will be hunters, even in Castle Mistmoore. This achievement can only be completed during the Hardcore Heritage event.

title: Throw Your Own Hand (Lavastorm Mountains)
description: Pieces of a long-forgotten game have been found throughout the Lavastorm Mountains. These pieces can only be found during the Scorched Sky event.

title: Timeless Fashion (Castle Mistmoore)
description: Some clothes never go out of style. Just ask the ageless vampires of Castle Mistmoore. This achievement can only be completed during the Hardcore Heritage event.

title: Vampire Trappings (Castle Mistmoore)
description: The vampires of Castle Mistmoore live a less than moral lifestyle. This achievement can only be completed during the Hardcore Heritage event.

title: Vintage Toy Ships (Stone Hive)
description: A Bixie Prankster has wandered off with a collection of vintage toy ships lost in the Stone Hive. These items can only be found during the Brew Day event.

title: Bloodied Chess Set (Butcherblock Mountains)
description: A grim set of bloodied chess pieces recovered from the rugged Butcherblock Mountains.

requirements.label: Event Active: 1171 (Year of Darkpaw Collections: June+)

title: Broken Key of Forests (Greater Faydark)
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the Year of Darkpaw March quest 'Broken Key of Forests'.

title: Broken Key of Frost (Everfrost Peaks)
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the Year of Darkpaw April quest 'Broken Key of Frost'.

title: Broken Key of Lava (Lavastorm Mountains)
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the Year of Darkpaw February quest 'Broken Key of Lava'.

title: Broken Key of Sands (South Desert of Ro)
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the Year of Darkpaw January quest 'Broken Key of Sands'.

title: Broken Key of Sky (Lake Rathetear)
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the Year of Darkpaw May quest 'Broken Key of Sky'.

title: Clay Golem Parts (City of Mist)
description: A captivating collection of deactivated clay golem parts that were salvaged from the enigmatic City of Mist.

requirements.label: Event Active: 1173 (Year of Darkpaw Collections: August+)

title: Crystalline Shards (Permafrost Keep)
description: A mesmerizing collection of shimmering crystalline shards found within the chilling depths of Permafrost Keep.

requirements.label: Event Active: 1170 (Year of Darkpaw Collections: May+)

title: Dragon Bones (Western Wastes)
description: An imposing collection of dragon bones scattered amidst the icy and desolate landscape of The Western Wastes.

requirements.label: Event Active: 1177 (Year of Darkpaw Collections: December+)

title: Drolvarg Medallions (Karnor's Castle)
description: A collection of polished medallions taken from the ranks of drolvarg occupying Karnor's Castle.

requirements.label: Event Active: 1174 (Year of Darkpaw Collections: September+)

title: Fae Drake Wings (The Greater Faydark)
description: A captivating collection of iridescent fae drake wings gathered from the enchanted forests of The Greater Faydark.

requirements.label: Event Active: 1168 (Year of Darkpaw Collections: March+)

title: Gnoll Essences (Blackburrow)
description: The strange amalgamation of parts that somehow make up the gnolls of Blackburrow.

requirements.label: Event Active: 1166 (Year of Darkpaw Collections: January+)

title: Mysterious Decoctions (Velketor's Labyrinth)
description: A series of unlabeled decoctions that were meticulously extracted and stored in Velketor's Labyrinth.

requirements.label: Event Active: 1176 (Year of Darkpaw Collections: November+)

title: Oasis of Forests (Tides of Time)
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the Year of Darkpaw March heroic adventure 'Oasis of Forests'.

title: Oasis of Frost (Tides of Time)
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the Year of Darkpaw April heroic adventure 'Oasis of Frost'.

title: Oasis of Lava (Tides of Time)
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the Year of Darkpaw February heroic adventure 'Oasis of Lava'.

title: Oasis of Sand (Tides of Time)
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the Year of Darkpaw January heroic adventure  'Oasis of Sand'.

title: Oasis of Sky (Tides of Time)
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the Year of Darkpaw May heroic adventure 'Oasis of Sky'.

title: Poison-Scarred Locket (The Ruins of Sebilis)
description: The parts of a ruined locket, scarred by poisonous dragon breath in The Ruins of Sebilis.

requirements.label: Event Active: 1175 (Year of Darkpaw Collections: October+)

title: Red Dragon Scales (Nagafen's Lair)
description: A striking collection of fiery-red dragon scales, painstakingly acquired from the molten confines of Nagafen's Lair.

requirements.label: Event Active: 1167 (Year of Darkpaw Collections: February+)

title: Ruinous Moths (The Ruins of Old Guk)
description: The flittering wings of moths both ethereal and ghastly can be spotted in the darkness of Lower Guk.

requirements.label: Event Active: 1172 (Year of Darkpaw Collections: July+)

title: Unrest Cursed Objects (Estate of Unrest)
description: An unsettling selection of cursed objects concealed within the foreboding halls of the Estate of Unrest.

requirements.label: Event Active: 1169 (Year of Darkpaw Collections: April+)
